context_values.graph.goal: Say hello and demonstrate a basic Fabro workflow
context_values.last_response:
Hello! I’m Fabro, and this is a test of the Fabro workflow engine.  

I’m here to help demonstrate how a workflow can be started, executed, and observed end to end.
